MEMORANDUM OF POINTS AND AUTHORITIES
MINUTES
(404)PETITIONER APPEARED IN PROPRIA PERSONA. RESPONDENT APPEARED THROUGH COUNSEL. RESPONDENT FAILED TO APPEAR FOR THE PROPERTY EXCHANGE AND THE PROPERTY WAS OTHERWISE
NOT AVAILABLE TO PETITIONER. A BODY ATTACHMENT SHALL ISSUE FOR RESPONDENT BECAUSE HE HAS FAILED TO FOLLOW THE ORDER OF THIS COURT. THE BODY
WITHIN TWENTY-FOUR HOURS THEN THE BODY ATTACHMENT SHALL DISSOLVE. PETITIONER HAS MISSED EARNINGS OF APPROXIMATELY $360.00 FROM THE WEEKEND AND FROM
T OF MOVING AND FOR MISSED WORK ON SATURDAY AND TUESDAY. THE COURT RESERVED JURISDICTION OVER THE RETRIEVAL OF THE PERSONAL PROPERTY. PETITIONER
PROCEEDINGS REPORTED BY DOROTHY DARBY CSR# 11066
